purpose: Implement story-scoped changes on dedicated branches using the approved contract, tests, and knowledge base context.
inputs: Approved REQ-ENT-RELEASE-R1 and its observable acceptance criteria
Seven reviewed source commits and the detached release rehearsal evidence
outputs: Policy-driven release artifact verifier and safe tar reader
Reversible Installer V2 with check, plan, apply, validate, confirm and restore
Verified, strict-SemVer and retry-safe GitHub release workflow
Consistent v0.12.0 package metadata, documentation and release tests
validation: decision and assumption changes are recorded
no unauthorized tool or resource use
npm run check, git diff --check, npm pack dry-run, doctor and CLI smoke checks pass on Node.js 24.
Release verifier tests pass on Node.js 18, 20 and 24, including a real packed-artifact smoke test.
All Python Installer V2 tests pass and prove plan is zero-write and restore is exact.
The complete Node.js 24 suite, bounded benchmark and strict story gate pass with zero blockers.
Identity, secret and packaged-path audits pass before push and all GitHub CI plus GitGuardian checks pass before merge.
metrics: Every acceptance criterion has executable evidence before push.

notes: Apply the ten-file rehearsal hardening only after the seven ordered source commits, then bump only live version references to 0.12.0.

contextualization.summary: Integrate the seven reviewed release commits and the validated rehearsal hardening onto the final portfolio mainline, then prepare the exact v0.12.0 pull request without publishing or installing it.
constraints: Use atomic commits and preserve Antonio Antenore as author and committer.
Resolve package.json by retaining the portfolio provider-subject check, adding release verifier and workflow-guard checks, and packaging config plus both installer protocols.
Installer V2 is the canonical path; Installer V1 remains only an explicit post-terminal RTK bridge.
No npm publication, tag, GitHub release, local installation, global configuration mutation, secret access or production access.

approvals.summary: Antonio ha approvato esclusivamente il brief di implementazione 0.12.0 mostrato, con test, esclusioni e profilo di autonomia specifico della PR.

scope.principle: A human approval applies only to the specific artifact or decision shown to the user before the approval.
